detectors.description:
Reentrancy in D_BANK.Collect(uint256) (D_BANK.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (D_BANK.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (D_BANK.sol#97)
	D_BANK.balances (D_BANK.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- D_BANK.Collect(uint256) (D_BANK.sol#81-105)
	- D_BANK.Deposit() (D_BANK.sol#65-77)
	- D_BANK.balances (D_BANK.sol#9)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [D_BANK.Collect(uint256)](D_BANK.sol#L81-L105):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](D_BANK.sol#L93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= _am](D_BANK.sol#L97)
	[D_BANK.balances](D_BANK.sol#L9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [D_BANK.Collect(uint256)](D_BANK.sol#L81-L105)
	- [D_BANK.Deposit()](D_BANK.sol#L65-L77)
	- [D_BANK.balances](D_BANK.sol#L9)
